title: Color
description: Represents a color in the RGBA color space. Values are in the range [0, 1].

red.description: The amount of red in the color as a value in the range [0, 1].

green.description: The amount of green in the color as a value in the range [0, 1].

blue.description: The amount of blue in the color as a value in the range [0, 1].

alpha.description: The fraction of this color that should be applied to the pixel. A value of 1.0 corresponds to a solid color.
